prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a statistical model approximating a geometric Brownian motion (random walk with drift), using the current price of $248.04. A very modest daily positive drift (0.01%) was assumed to calculate the point estimate. Historical daily volatility was estimated at 1.5% and scaled over 22 days using the square root of time to construct the confidence intervals around this estimate. These predictions are purely statistical and do not incorporate real-time market news, fundamental analysis, or other qualitative and quantitative factors that can significantly influence stock prices. Stock prices are highly unpredictable, and actual future prices may fall outside these intervals.
